display: Help me understand what my project is about. Get me up to date on the lastest

Ive been having inconsistencies latetly with the way it works. When an auth user logs in and goes through the workflow, the results are saved to their profile, they can access the dashboard and view all previous results. \
\
However in guest mode, that workflow seems inconsistent when I reach the results page. When Im in the results page as a guest, instead of asking me to go dashboard, it encourages me to sign up to save my results, and be able to view it later. A plus side of having a dashboard is you get AI powered analysis that combines your onboarding information or profile information along with the latest lab results. \
\
Can you confirm if thats the workflow. Can you also confirm if it works for me
I want you to examine the project and tell me what you understand from. Explain to me if some logic seems broken
We had to revert back to the recent git update because there was an api error
